title: EXPLOSIVE BOWS!
description: This mod adds EXPLOSIVE BOWS with a BLAST POWER of 4!
body:
## EXPLOSIVE BOWS

This mod adds EXPLOSIVE BOWS with a BLAST POWER of 4!

Embark on a riveting archery experience with our Explosive Bows mod. Unleash the power of explosive arrows that detonate upon impact, taking your gameplay to a whole new level. Here's a concise overview of the key features and their impact on your user experience:

### Features:
Adds Explosive Bow: Every arrow you release explodes on impact with a blast radius, adding a thrilling and explosive element to your archery encounters.

### How It Affects Your Experience:
It allows you to attack mobs or players with a whole new type of bow! The EXPLOSIVE BOW
